General.Name: KangLi International Holdings Ltd
General.Description: KangLi International Holdings Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the manufacture and sale of steel products in the People's Republic of China and Thailand. It operates in three segments: Hard Steel Coil, Unpainted Galvanised Steel Products, and Painted Galvanised Steel Products. The Hard Steel Coil segment provides cold-rolled hard steel coils. The Unpainted Galvanised Steel Products segment offers hot-dipped galvanized/zinc-coated steel coils and sheets. The Painted Galvanised Steel Products segment provides hot-dipped color-coated galvanized steel coils and sheets. The company sells its products to midstream steel product processors, as well as to home appliance manufacturers for use in the production of refrigerators, washing machines, and ovens. It also engages in the steel products trading and property management businesses. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Changzhou, China.

5.Name: Mr. Yau Tong  Chung ACCA, CPA
